# Generated by ollama (codegemma)
# Prompt: Create Kafka broker configuration file (server.properties) for production deployment. Configure listeners, log directories, and replication settings. Set up Zookeeper connection and broker ID. This is for our distributed Kafka cluster.
# Category: kafka_topic_authorization

# Broker configuration file (server.properties) for production deployment

# Zookeeper connection
zookeeper.connect=zookeeper-server1:2181,zookeeper-server2:2181,zookeeper-server3:2181

# Broker ID
broker.id=0

# Listeners
listeners=PLAINTEXT://kafka-broker:9092

# Log directories
log.dirs=/path/to/log/directory

# Replication settings
replica.fetch.min.bytes=1048576
replica.fetch.max.bytes=10485760
min.insync.replicas=2
